funFacts: Mosasaurus is closely related to modern monitor lizards and snakes, swimming with a serpentine side-to-side body motion.
Mosasaurus was a giant, air-breathing marine reptile that ruled the Cretaceous seas, growing up to 50 feet (15 meters) in length.
